s: Empowers ADB through Shizuku to record phone calls on non-rooted device!
d:
ShizuCallRecorder is the first non-root FOSS call recorder app for Android 11+. It empowers ADB through Shizuku to use an advanced list of permissions granted to the shell application (Shell AndroidManifest). Latest ShellManifest URL: View latest source

Features

  • Records both sides of phone calls (incoming and outgoing)
    • Should work even when using Bluetooth or a remote headset
  • Security toggles to manage Shizuku on/off state
    • Helps reduce the potential attack surface introduced by Shizuku
    • Helps with apps that detect or warn when USB debugging or Shizuku is enabled
  • Automatic call recording option with basic exclusion rules:
    • Ignore anonymous calls
    • Ignore specific contacts
    • Ignore all contacts
  • Saves recordings using Opus or AAC codec
  • The app runs only on phone event changes, with no persistent background process and no notifications

Requirements

  • Android 11 or newer
  • See the Android Tested Versions table on GitHub for more information on limitations
  • Shizuku (recommended fork: thedjchi)

Installation

Please follow the installation instructions in the SUPPORT documentation, under Installation & Configuration. Please note that the official release source is GitHub. Builds are signed with my key, immutable, and attested so you can track them back to the Github Runner (Build CI). F-Droid builds are provided for convenience, but are build and signed by F-Droid, they could have been voluntarily or involuntarily tampered with at any point during build process. I recommend you use Github builds.

Support the Project

If you find ShizuCallRecorder useful and want to support its development, you can contribute in several ways:

  • Contribute to the project on GitHub: Contributing Guide
  • Support ongoing development via GitHub Sponsors: Sponsor kitsumed

Disclaimer

Recording phone calls may be subject to complex and varying laws in different countries and jurisdictions.

For example, you may need to ensure you have consent from all parties before recording conversations.The developers and contributors are not responsible for any misuse or legal consequences arising from the use of this application.

You can learn more on Wikipedia at: Telephone call recording laws.

If you are legally required to inform or ask someone for consent before recording, please note that the application DOES NOT handle this for you. In some cases, certain features, like automatic call recording, may not be legally allowed. It is your responsibility to ensure compliance with applicable laws. This is not legal advice. Please consult a legal professional for guidance regarding your specific situation.
